data.body: PASS 1 review (criterion G1G2 — edit-set / scope accuracy). All three files in `## Files` exist and are correctly characterized at a high level (verified `init.py` `_GITATTRIBUTES`/`_GITIGNORE`, `_advisory_lock.py` lock/gate writers, `push.py` stash/merge dance). Affirming: no hallucinated edit targets. However, the edit set under-enumerates the actual write/commit sites and consumers for the `.bridge_state/` half of the change — see findings below.
